sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39825" key="e)piko/pths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπικόπτ-ης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n39825.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">satirist, censor</tr_>, Timo<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4080.tlg001:60" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">60</biblScope> </bibl> (v. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐπισκώπτης</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
